name: RPlog_Assassin
title: Assassin!
summary: On a rainy afternoon in Plaxton City's entertainment district, the Imperial Ambassador to Caspar, Morganna Tazecks, holds court with her aides at an outdoor cafe while a crowd of regulars -- FLS smuggler Benjawa and his pilots Naldo and Selektah, the troublemaking Horansi cub Kaein, the Quarren guard Qua'lor, and the Caspian Ranger Webb -- mingle nearby. As Morganna walks off to discuss FLS shipping woes over wine, a concealed sniper on a rooftop opens fire, gravely wounding the Ambassador in the throat and stomach and killing a nine-year-old Sarian girl who had just bumped into her. In the chaos, Qua'lor and the doctor Jindra fight to keep Morganna alive while marines and bystanders scramble to locate the shooter. Webb, with his spotter Sung and the keen-nosed Kaein, tracks the killer to a distant rooftop, only to find he has shot himself; Webb fires a confirming round into the corpse. Investigators Defcon and Rabid arrive to process the scene, and the dead assassin is identified as Adams Garat, a Lieutenant in New Republic Fleet Ops, leaving the true motive and affiliation an open question.
